title: cydonia oblonga f. pyriformis
intro: Cydonia oblonga f. pyriformis, also known as quince, is a deciduous shrub or small tree in the rose family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible fruit. The medicinal properties of quince include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of quince include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. Quince is often prepared as a tea, jam, or syrup, and can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and infusions.
